sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19701" key="bdellola/rugc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βδελλολάρυγξ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υγγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n19701.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leech-throat</tr_>, name for <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a greedy parasite</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
